comment: I have tried every method I can, even looking up other people's solutions online, to get it to stop recommending completely random things to me. I have no topics, people, or boards followed. I mark everything that isn't the ONE thing I'm on here for (wedding inspiration!) as not relevant. I have been doing this for months, cleared app cache, everything, but 80% of my home is random Tumblr posts, cooking, and baby stuff. I'm so close to giving up on the algorithm and just downloading my board.
key sentence: The key words from the comment are: "random things", "recommendations", "not relevant", "algorithm".
the function of activity: Activity involves searching, accessing menus, filtering, viewing various content categories, managing pins, profiles, settings, creating, sharing, and navigating within the interface.
the sub-task list of state: [{'name': 'Create', 'description': 'Tab for creating something'}, {'name': 'Notifications', 'description': 'Tab for viewing notifications'}, {'name': 'Saved', 'description': 'Tab for viewing saved items'}, {'name': 'Avatar: Jane', 'description': 'Display the avatar for the user Jane'}, {'name': 'Access Search Page', 'description': 'Access the search page.'}, {'name': 'Browse content', 'description': 'Browse recommended pins.'}]

operations.event: click
